steps.title: Use the comfort clue
steps.content: The text says humanoid features are included so that people will find robots easier to interact with. Those features can help produce feelings of comfort, even though a robot that looks too human can become unsettling.

steps.title: Pick the creation verb
steps.content: Choice B means restrict, Choice C means offset, and Choice D means reject. None of those fits helping feelings of comfort come into being. Engender means cause or give rise to, which matches the context. The answer is A.
